_comment: Inbound POST (XML decoded to JSON here for readability). Verify signature: sort(token, timestamp, nonce) → SHA1. WeChat sends XML, not JSON.

xml.Content:
你好！我想了解更多关于冥想课程的信息。
(Hello! I want to learn more about meditation sessions.)

_note: WeChat webhooks are XML. This JSON representation is for documentation purposes. Your server must parse XML and respond with XML.
